since_last: 40% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.27%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.47% · Gold -2.31% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 40% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.27%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.27%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -13.27%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +5.83%, GEV +4.76%, CBRS +4.43%, NRG +4.00%, AMAT +3.81%. Laggards: TSLA -13.27%, GOOGL -6.62%, CRNC -6.07%, PATH -4.67%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.48% at $115.81
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.48% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
